payload.answer: I did not commit this to durable memory because it is a transient observation about today’s weather.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable personal entity or stable fact was identified; the input describes a transient weather condition.

repair_options: If you want, I can store a general preference or location-specific weather pattern instead.
If you meant a lasting condition or recurring pattern, please restate it that way.

raw_text: {"intent":"store_memory","decision":"not_committed","memory_cards":[{"kind":"ephemeral_observation","statement":"Today’s weather is cloudy.","confidence":"low","entities":[{"name":"today","type":"time_reference","role":"temporal_anchor"},{"name":"weather","type":"ambient_condition","role":"topic"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"today","predicate":"has_weather_condition","object":"cloudy"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"No durable personal entity or stable fact was identified; the input describes a transient weather condition."},"conflict_classification":"non_conflicting_ephemeral","answer":"I did not commit this to durable memory because it is a transient observation about today’s weather.","citations":["/brain remember Today's weather is cloudy"],"repair_options":["If you want, I can store a general preference or location-specific weather pattern instead.","If you meant a lasting condition or recurring pattern, please restate it that way."],"receipt":{"success":false,"details":["Transient weather observation detected.","No durable memory stored."]}}
